name: c2pa-rs-javascript-library
description: A TypeScript library using Rust via WASM

scripts.build:wasm: CC=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang AR=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/llvm-ar wasm-pack build crate --target bundler --out-dir ../pkg
scripts.test:wasm: CC=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang AR=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/llvm-ar wasm-pack build crate --target nodejs --out-dir ../pkg
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
